courses.title: Introduction to Computer Programming
courses.description: Programming foundations and computational problem solving.

courses.title: Foundations of Computer Science I
courses.description: Programming, data modelling, and computational problem solving.

courses.title: Foundations of Computer Science II
courses.description: Abstract data types, software design, and algorithmic analysis.

courses.title: Introduction to Computer Science
courses.description: Object-oriented design, recursion, and data structures.

courses.title: Mathematical Expression and Reasoning
courses.description: Proofs, asymptotic analysis, and mathematical reasoning for CS.

courses.title: Software Design
courses.description: Team software development, architecture, testing, and maintainability.

courses.title: Theory of Computation I
courses.description: Induction, correctness, recurrence relations, and formal languages.

courses.title: Data Structures and Analysis
courses.description: Design and analysis of efficient data structures and algorithms.

courses.title: Calculus I with Proofs
courses.description: Limits, continuity, differentiation, and proof-based calculus.

courses.title: Calculus II with Proofs
courses.description: A continuation of proof-based single-variable calculus.

courses.title: An Introduction to Statistical Reasoning and Data Science
courses.description: Data exploration, uncertainty, and reproducible statistical analysis.
